title: Lesson Manifest
description: Pre-compiled patterns for fast hook-time matching. Generated by `lessons build` from the SQLite lesson store.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for IDE validation

type.description: Discriminator field for file type identification

generatedAt.description: When this manifest was last rebuilt

config.description: Snapshot of config values at build time, so hooks never read config.json

lessons.description: Lessons keyed by ULID for fast lookup

source.description: Regex source string. Reconstruct via: new RegExp(source, flags)

slug.description: For logging and dedup claim filenames

type.description: Injection behavior: hint=context injection at PreToolUse, guard=deny tool call, protocol=session-start only, directive=session-start only (mandatory)

priority.description: For sort-time access without loading the full store

commandRegexSources.description: Pre-compiled regex sources for command matching

pathRegexSources.description: Pre-compiled regex sources for file path matching. Globs converted to regex at build time.

message.description: Pre-rendered markdown. The ONLY content read for injection. No file I/O needed.

summary.description: Fallback if message exceeds remaining budget

disabled.description: If true, lesson is excluded from all matching. Only present when true.
